briefing.headline: Vertical and precise — pre-spawn stained conditions call for reaction baits on deep structure.
briefing.gameplan:
In pre-spawn with stained water and pre frontal conditions, reaction presentations shine.

Wheeler: Aggressively snaps the Jigging Rap 4-5 feet above grouped-up bass to force committed fish to swim up; when they reach the bait and you stop it, it glides naturally downward and that's when you get bit.

Key adjustment for pre frontal: aggressive, faster retrieves — fish are feeding actively before the front.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Aggressively snaps the Jigging Rap 4-5 feet above grouped-up bass to force committed fish to swim up; when they reach the bait and you stop it, it glides naturally downward and that's when yo
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on grass, bluff, riprap. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.retrieve: Match the conditions — aggressive, faster retrieves — fish are feeding actively before the front.
alternateApproach.targets: Focus on grass, bluff, riprap. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: KVD: 'Three swimbait styles for different conditions: Bulkier hollow-body for slower presentations — great prespawn and stained water for extra vibration. Subtle finesse swimbaits (like Swimming Shiner) for clear water and tough bites on bright da...

Palaniuk: 'The spot had a riprap bank with a steep drop, then a trough that came up onto a hard bottom ridge, tapered back off into another trough. The trough made a horseshoe. A 40-yard section where the fish wanted to live, with a 25-foot hole t...
Wheeler: For a spring pre-spawn event limited to three rods, picks a jerkbait/crankbait for deeper staging fish, a 1/2-oz jig for versatility, and a ChatterBait for stained shallow water.

briefing.depthStrategy: Pre-frontal pre-spawn bass are aggressive and moving shallow. Expect fish in the 4-8ft range on secondary points and channel swings. Falling pressure pulls fish up from staging areas — target the first breakline off spawning flats.
adjustIf: If the front stalls and conditions stabilize, dial back aggression and focus on higher-percentage structure
If water clears significantly, downsize presentations and move to natural color patterns
